# Toyota MR2 (AW11) 1988 — Factory Service Manual

> **Overview / scope note — review before conversion.** *What the manual contains*
> comes from the manual's own section headers (authoritative). Engine/vehicle
> *background* is best-effort context (web + `auto-mechanic` skill) and is
> **review-pending** — NOT from the manual.

## What this manual is

Toyota's factory repair manual for the **first-generation MR2 (AW11)**, 1988 model
year — the whole-vehicle FSM (engine, drivetrain, chassis, body electrical, A/C).
1066 pages, unencrypted, already carries a text layer (OCR present).

Sourced from Internet Archive (`1988-toyota-mr-2-repair-manual-toyota`), free and
unrestricted.

This covers OIO's **"Goblin"** — Ian's 1985 AW11, 4A-GE, KCRX rallycross car (see
`projects/goblin-mr2/`). The '88 manual applies to the '85 in the large majority of
mechanical detail; watch for year-specific notes.

## Engine & vehicle background *(best-effort — review pending, not from the manual)*

- **Engines covered: 4A-GE and 4A-GZE** (the manual's intro names both). 1.6 L
  (1,587 cc) DOHC 16-valve inline-4, T-VIS. **4A-GZE** adds an SC12 roots
  **supercharger** + intercooler (hence the Supercharger section). Goblin runs a
  naturally-aspirated **4A-GE**.
- **Chassis: AW11** — mid-engine, RWD, transverse 4A. Transaxles: **C52** (4A-GE) /
  **E51** (4A-GZE) manual, **A240E/A241E** automatic. (The manual's MT section documents
  the C52 and E51 units specifically.)
- Note: 4A-GE engine internals overlap the repo's existing `toyota-4a-fe-4a-ge` engine
  manual — this AW11 book adds the *chassis/body/AW11-specific* context (mounts,
  supercharger, transaxle, brakes, electrical) around it.

## What the manual COVERS (from its section headers)

Introduction, Maintenance, Engine Mechanical, **Supercharger System (4A-GZE)**, EFI &
Emission Control, Engine Lubrication, Ignition, Starting, Charging, Clutch, Manual
Transmission (C50/C52), Automatic Transmission (A240E/A241E), Front Suspension & Axle,
Rear Suspension & Axle, Brakes, Steering, Body Electrical, Air Conditioning, and an
Appendix (Service Specifications, SST, index).

## Caveats

- **Section boundaries were auto-detected** from page running-headers (no embedded TOC).
  Ranges in `manifest.yml` are close but may be off by a page or two at section seams —
  cleanup cross-checks the page images and corrects.
- OCR is present but 1988-scan quality; screen for the usual OCR-misreads (glossary).
- Provenance: original © Toyota Motor Corporation, committed here without a license — a
  considered risk consistent with the rest of the repo (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
